are-you-sure-you-want-to-delet:
Are you sure you want to delete this address?
This action cannot be undone!
biling-email-tooltip: Email address used for invoices, billing notifications, and financial communications.
company-phone-tooltip: Main contact number of your company. Include country code for international communication.
company-profile-update-failed: Company profile update failed. Please try again in a few minutes.
display-name-tooltip: The name shown inside the dashboard and reports. This can differ from the legal name.
legal-name-tooltip: The official registered name of your company as it appears in legal documents and tax registrations.
vat-number-tooltip: Your company’s VAT or tax identification number used for invoicing and tax reporting.
